sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 월마트는 1분기 매출 1,778억 달러를 기록하며 전년 대비 7.3% 성장했고, 글로벌 이커머스 매출이 26% 증가하며 실적을 견인했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 1분기 매출은 1,778억 달러로 전년 대비 7.3% 성장했으며, 글로벌 이커머스 매출은 26% 증가했습니다.
GAAP 기준 주당순이익(EPS)은 0.67달러, 조정 EPS는 0.66달러를 기록했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 글로벌 광고 사업 매출이 37% 성장했으며, 멤버십 수수료 수익 또한 17.4% 증가했습니다.
월마트 미국 부문의 동일 매장 매출은 4.1% 증가했으며, 식료품 부문의 강력한 수요로 인해 글로벌 재고가 8.9% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 영업이익은 4억 달러 증가하여 전년 대비 5.0% 성장했습니다.
영업활동 현금흐름은 47억 달러로 전년 대비 7억 달러 감소했습니다.

watchItems.text: 배송 및 물류 부문의 연료비 상승이 영업이익에 미치는 영향이 지속될지 확인이 필요합니다.
식료품 수요와 재고 증가 추세가 향후 수익성에 미칠 영향을 모니터링해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 earningsreleasefy27q1.htm EX-99.1 Document Walmart reports first quarter results • Revenue growth of 7.3%, up 5.9% in constant currency (cc) 1 • Operating income growth of 5.0%, up 5.1% adjusted (cc) 1 • eCommerce sales up 26% globally • GAAP EPS of $0.67; Adjusted EPS 1 of $0.66 • Company issues guidance for Q2; reiterates outlook for FY27 “ BENTONVILLE, Ark., May 21, 2026 – Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ: WMT) announces first-quarter results with strong growth in revenue, including eCommerce, which grew 26% globally with strength across segments. Walmart U.S. comp sales 2 grew 4.1%. Operating income up 5.0%, negatively affected by 250 bps from higher fuel costs in distribution and fulfillment. Looking ahead, the Company issues guidance for the second quarter with net sales expected to grow 4% to 5% and adjusted operating income to grow 7% to 10%, both in constant currency (“cc”) 1 . Ad  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.67 = 0.67달러; $0.66 = 0.66달러.

justed EPS 1 is expected to be $0.72 to $0.74. The Company’s outlook for fiscal 2027 remains unchanged from prior guidance. Our results reflect our continued focus on delivering across the enterprise — better shopping experiences, a broader assortment, and faster delivery. Our teams are adopting innovative technologies, driving productivity through automation, and growing higher-margin commerce solutions. It’s a disciplined approach that’s helping us grow the business and strengthen returns.” John Furner President and CEO, Walmart First Quarter Highlights • Revenue of $177.8 billion, up 7.3%, or 5.9% (cc) 1 • Global eCommerce sales grew 26%, led by store-fulfilled pickup & delivery and marketplace • Global advertising business 3 up 37%, with strength across segments. Walmart U.S. advertising up 36% • Membership fee revenue grew 17.4% globally • Gross profit rate up 6 bps, led by W  Normalized numeric aliases: $177.8 billion = 1,778억 달러; $0.72 = 0.72달러; $0.74 = 0.74달러; $177.8 = 177.8달러.

U.S. • Operating income up $0.4 billion, or 5.0%; up 5.1% adjusted (cc) 1 • Adjusted EPS 1 of $0.66 excludes the impact, net of tax, from a net gain of $0.02 on equity and other investments, and $0.01 from business reorganization charges • ROA at 8.4%; ROI at 14.9% 1 , negatively affected ~45 bps from discrete items 4 • Global inventory up 8.9%; up 7.8% (cc) 5 , affected by the timing of receipts, strong unit demand in grocery for Walmart U.S., and fuel • The Company raised $4.25 billion in long-term debt for general corporate purposes at favorable rates 1 See additional information at the end of this release regarding non-GAAP financial measures. 2 Comp sales for the 13-week period ended May 1, 2026 compared to the 13-week period ended May 2, 2025 and excludes fuel. See Supplemental Financial Information for additional informat  Normalized numeric aliases: $0.4 billion = 4억 달러; $4.25 billion = 42억 5,000만 달러; $0.4 = 0.4달러; $0.66 = 0.66달러; $0.02 = 0.02달러; $0.01 = 0.01달러; $4.25 = 4.25달러.

net sales or as a reduction to cost of sales, depending on the nature of the advertising arrangement. 4 Represents items which were adjusted from operating income in the current and prior year. 5 Inventory grew 8.9% on a reported basis and grew 7.8% in constant currency, excluding a ~$0.6 billion foreign currency impact. “cc” - constant currency Key Financial Metrics Dollars in billions, except per share data. Dollar and percentage changes may not recalculate due to rounding. Charts may not be to scale. generation.costPolicy: Provider chain: Spark OAuth/free first, Gemini free second, approved DeepSeek v4 flash paid last on quota only.
